sourceMovie.title: Swiped
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Swiped (2025) stuck because it commits to its history premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Rachel Lee Goldenberg's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The history and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Queen
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Swiped clicked for you, The Queen (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in history and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Swiped?
faq.answer: Try The Queen, The Pursuit of Happyness, Purple Hearts—each shares DNA with Swiped while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Swiped?
faq.answer: Swiped (2025) is best described as History, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Swiped worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this history lane.
